initiatives.name: Miami Workers Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization building power with domestic workers, tenants, and low-income communities through mutual aid, leadership development, and organizing for economic and gender justice. They provide direct support while fighting for systemic change through community-led campaigns.

initiatives.name: Catalyst Miami
initiatives.description: A community organization fostering mutual aid and economic justice through comprehensive support programs across Miami-Dade County. They coordinate prosperity services, climate resilience initiatives, and community economic development while building power through leadership training, policy advocacy, and creating spaces for community-driven change focused on health, housing, and environmental justice.

initiatives.name: Beyond the Bars
initiatives.description: Worker-led organization building power with criminalized workers through mutual aid, advocacy, and organizing to transform the labor movement and end employment discrimination.

initiatives.name: Miami Dream Defenders
initiatives.description: Dream Defenders is a Black-led, feminist, socialist, abolitionist, and internationalist political formation fighting for a world without prisons, police, capitalism, and imperialism.

initiatives.name: Healing and Justice Center
initiatives.description: A community-based public safety program by @thedreamdefenders, @circleofbrotherhood, @dadecsr + @touchingmiamiwithlove

initiatives.name: Dade County Street Response
initiatives.description: We are doctors within borders who practice in hospitals without walls.

initiatives.name: Power U Center for Social Change
initiatives.description: A youth-led organization fostering mutual aid and community power through organizing for racial, gender, and educational justice in Miami. They coordinate leadership development, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through youth organizing, transformative justice, and creating spaces for young people to lead movements for social change.

initiatives.name: Miami Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid through free food distribution and community solidarity in Miami. They coordinate weekly food shares, resource recovery, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action against food waste and hunger, creating spaces for community gathering and collective care.

initiatives.name: Skunk Ape Liberation Union
initiatives.description: Skunk Ape Liberation Union is an anarchist/left-libertarian mutual aid organization based in South Florida (primarily Miami-Dade county).

initiatives.name: Black Rose/Rosa Negra - Miami
initiatives.description: A local chapter of Black Rose/Rosa Negra Anarchist Federation, organizing for community power through direct action, mutual aid, and political education in Miami-Dade.

initiatives.name: The Joy & Liberation Center
initiatives.description: Trans Resource centers in Miami-Dade and Broward County in Collaboration with @transsocial & @themckenzieprojectinc

initiatives.name: Black Miami-Dade
initiatives.description: Black Miami-Dade is a public history and creative studio that honors Miami's Black past.

initiatives.name: Cienfuegos Co-op
initiatives.description: Cultivating a culture of resistance in the 305 Fundraising for Miami's 1st worker owned & democratically run anarchist bookstore, cafe, & event space.

initiatives.name: Buddy System Miami
initiatives.description: Empowering neighbors to support neighbors, beginning with food access and continuing with viable support for long-term change.

initiatives.name: Trans Social
initiatives.description: TransSOCIAL advocates for Trans visibility and unity within TLGBQ+ community. Currently serving the community in Florida and Georgia.
